case_title: DIEGO ANDRES ELLERMAN VS. BRANDON FRANK ZEEK ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,944.00 FILED BY ELLERMAN, DIEGO ANDRES AS TO DEFENDANT ZEEK, BRANDON FRANK BERGMAN, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF DIEGO ANDRES ELLERMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRANDON FRANK ZEEK IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM BERGMAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT BERGMAN. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO DISMISSES CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT BERGMAN AND HAVE THE HEARING TODAY. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $150.00) SERVED JUL-28-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZEEK, BRANDON FRANK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLERMAN, DIEGO ANDRES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZEEK, BRANDON FRANK $5,944.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,169.00, PLAINTIFF DISMISSES CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT WILLIAM BERGMAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 10/12/21. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO BRANDON FRANK ZEEK-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD
